name: io.github.coopergwrenn/postals-mcp
description: Send physical handwritten postcards from any AI agent. Real pen & ink, USPS, $4.99/card.

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Postals API key from postals.ai/developers.

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_SENDER_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Default sender full name for return address.

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_DEFAULT_CARD_IMAGE
environmentVariables.description: Default card front image URL (HTTPS, PNG or JPEG, landscape 7x5 preferred).

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_HANDWRITING_STYLE
environmentVariables.description: Default handwriting font. Default: Joyful Jennifer.

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_DAILY_LIMIT
environmentVariables.description: Max cards per day (safety net). Default: 50.

environmentVariables.name: POSTALS_TEST_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' for test mode (validates inputs, no cards actually sent).

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables AI message generation via Cloudflare Workers AI.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Required together with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID for AI message generation.
